bookmaker_multiplicative_best_line.description: Primary fair value versus bookmaker de-vig baseline with multiplicative method and best-line aggregation on paired evaluation rows.

assumptions: paired loss differentials are treated as approximately iid
normal approximation is applied to the mean loss differential
brier_error.comparison_note: all paired loss differentials are identical; the normal approximation is degenerate

assumptions: paired loss differentials are treated as approximately iid
normal approximation is applied to the mean loss differential
log_loss.comparison_note: all paired loss differentials are identical; the normal approximation is degenerate

bookmaker_multiplicative_independent.description: Primary fair value versus bookmaker de-vig baseline with multiplicative method and independent grouping on paired evaluation rows.

assumptions: paired loss differentials are treated as approximately iid
normal approximation is applied to the mean loss differential
paired loss differentials are treated as approximately iid
normal approximation is applied to the mean loss differential

bookmaker_power_independent.description: Primary fair value versus bookmaker de-vig baseline with power method and independent grouping on paired evaluation rows.

assumptions: paired loss differentials are treated as approximately iid
normal approximation is applied to the mean loss differential
paired loss differentials are treated as approximately iid
normal approximation is applied to the mean loss differential

market_midpoint.description: Primary fair value versus market midpoint baseline derived from provided market snapshots on paired evaluation rows.

assumptions: paired loss differentials are treated as approximately iid
normal approximation is applied to the mean loss differential
paired loss differentials are treated as approximately iid
normal approximation is applied to the mean loss differential
log_loss.comparison_note: all paired loss differentials are identical; the normal-approximation test statistic is omitted
